description: Time series analysis question requiring the agent to understand the temporal dimension of the data.

turns.user_message: How have baby name trends changed over the years? Show me what's happening over time.
turns.rubric: The agent should discover the birth_names dataset, identify the datetime column (ds) as the time dimension, and understand the data spans multiple years. It should either create a time series chart (line chart with ds on x-axis) or explain the temporal patterns in the data. The response should reference the actual time range and suggest meaningful time-based analysis like trends in name popularity, diversity changes, or year-over-year comparisons.
